name: White Asparagus with Brown Butter
recipeIngredient: 2 quarts Boiling water mixed with 4 tsp Salt
2/3 cup Fine, soft white bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. SNAP OFF THE WOODY ENDS of the asparagus and discard them or save them to make soup.
2. Using a vegetable peeler, peel the asparagus spears.
3. Lay the asparagus spears flat in a large skillet.
4. Pour in the boiling salted water and set the pan over moderate heat. Cover it and cook until tender but still crisp, about 5 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, lightly brown the butter in a medium skillet over moderate heat.
6. Add the bread crumbs and pepper to the butter and lightly toss to mix.
7. Reduce the heat under the skillet to low to keep the crumbs warm.
8. When the asparagus are done, drain them well.
9. Return the drained asparagus to the skillet and gently shake over moderate heat for 30 seconds or so to dry any excess moisture.
10. Transfer the asparagus to a small heated platter.
11. Artfully arrange the crumb mixture on top.
